subject: [POLICY] Add helm chart for policy-gui
commit_message:
[POLICY] Add helm chart for policy-gui

Added helm chart for policy gui

Issue-ID: POLICY-3593
Change-Id: I8e0e1b7a31258bb860b304a1635f785517b443ae
Signed-off-by: ktimoney <kevin.timoney@est.tech>

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3433/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3433/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3433/ )

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review-2
> 
> single process per container please. here you have at least 3

There is only 1 main container and a sidecar for logging.
Can you be more specific on the processes you are talking about.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3: Code-Review-2
> > 
> > single process per container please. here you have at least 3
> 
> There is only 1 main container and a sidecar for logging.
> Can you be more specific on the processes you are talking about.

In the nginx config I can see:
http://localhost:17999
http://localhost:18989/

based on that I estimate that we have at least 3 processes:
1) nginx
2) one listening on 17999
3) one listening on 18989

isn't it the case here?
